sql.trim: t1.ID, t1.USER_ID, t1.DEPT_ID, t1.LEAGUE_ID, t1.SEX, t1.BIRTHDAY, t1.POST, t1.LEAGUE_POST, t1.INPARTY_DATE, t1.LEAGUE_STATUS, t1.INCOMPANYLC_DATE, t1.INDEPTLC_DATE, t1.CARD_ID, t1.NATION, t1.POLITICAL, t1.INLEAGUE_DATE, t1.EDUCATION, t1.PHONE, t1.TEL, t1.MAIL, t1.MARKS, t1.CREATED_BY, t1.CREATION_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATED_BY, t1.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, t1.LAST_UPDATE_IP, t1.VERSION, t1.ORG_IDENTITY, t1.CREATED_DEPT, t1.VALID_FLAG, t1.ATTRIBUTE_01, t1.ATTRIBUTE_02, t1.ATTRIBUTE_03, t1.ATTRIBUTE_04, t1.ATTRIBUTE_05, t1.ATTRIBUTE_06, t1.ATTRIBUTE_07, t1.ATTRIBUTE_08, t1.ATTRIBUTE_09, t1.ATTRIBUTE_10,

mapper.select:
select
from LEAGUE_MEMBER t1
and t1.id in
#{item}
order by t1.creation_date desc
mapper.insert:
insert into LEAGUE_MEMBER
ID,
USER_ID,
DEPT_ID,
LEAGUE_ID,
SEX,
BIRTHDAY,
POST,
LEAGUE_POST,
INPARTY_DATE,
LEAGUE_STATUS,
INCOMPANYLC_DATE,
INDEPTLC_DATE,
CARD_ID,
NATION,
POLITICAL,
INLEAGUE_DATE,
EDUCATION,
PHONE,
TEL,
MAIL,
MARKS,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_IP,
VERSION,
ORG_IDENTITY,
CREATED_DEPT,
VALID_FLAG,
ATTRIBUTE_01,
ATTRIBUTE_02,
ATTRIBUTE_03,
ATTRIBUTE_04,
ATTRIBUTE_05,
ATTRIBUTE_06,
ATTRIBUTE_07,
ATTRIBUTE_08,
ATTRIBUTE_09,
ATTRIBUTE_10,
#{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leagueId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{leaguePost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inpartyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{leagueStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{incompanylcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{indeptlcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{cardId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{political,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{inleagueDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{education,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{phone,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{mail,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{marks,jdbcType = CLOB},
#{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
#{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{version,jdbcType = DECIMAL},
#{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
#{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},

insert into LEAGUE_MEMBER( ID , USER_ID , DEPT_ID , LEAGUE_ID , SEX , BIRTHDAY , POST , LEAGUE_POST , INPARTY_DATE , LEAGUE_STATUS , INCOMPANYLC_DATE , INDEPTLC_DATE , CARD_ID , NATION , POLITICAL , INLEAGUE_DATE , EDUCATION , PHONE , TEL , MAIL , MARKS , CREATED_BY , CREATION_DATE , LAST_UPDATED_BY , LAST_UPDATE_DATE , LAST_UPDATE_IP , VERSION , ORG_IDENTITY , CREATED_DEPT , VALID_FLAG , ATTRIBUTE_01 , ATTRIBUTE_02 , ATTRIBUTE_03 , ATTRIBUTE_04 , ATTRIBUTE_05 , ATTRIBUTE_06 , ATTRIBUTE_07 , ATTRIBUTE_08 , ATTRIBUTE_09 , ATTRIBUTE_10 )
select #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.leagueId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.leaguePost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.inpartyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.leagueStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.incompanylcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.indeptlcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.cardId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.political,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.inleagueDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.education,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.phone,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.mail,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.marks,jdbcType = CLOB} , #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.version,jdbcType = DECIMAL} , #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} from dual
mapper.update:
update LEAGUE_MEMBER
ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAGUE_ID = #{leagueId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LEAGUE_POST = #{leaguePost,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INPARTY_DATE = #{inpartyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LEAGUE_STATUS = #{leagueStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INCOMPANYLC_DATE = #{incompanylcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
INDEPTLC_DATE = #{indeptlcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
CARD_ID = #{cardId,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
POLITICAL = #{political,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
INLEAGUE_DATE = #{inleagueDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
EDUCATION = #{education,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
PHONE = #{phone,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MAIL = #{mail,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
MARKS = #{marks,jdbcType = CLOB},
CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP},
LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VERSION = version+1,
ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
VALID_FLAG = #{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update LEAGUE_MEMBER set ID = #{id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_ID = #{leagueId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , POST = #{post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_POST = #{leaguePost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INPARTY_DATE = #{inpartyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LEAGUE_STATUS = #{leagueStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INCOMPANYLC_DATE = #{incompanylcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , INDEPTLC_DATE = #{indeptlcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CARD_ID = #{cardId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL = #{political,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INLEAGUE_DATE = #{inleagueDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EDUCATION = #{education,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PHONE = #{phone,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MAIL = #{mail,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MARKS = #{marks,jdbcType = CLOB} , CREATED_BY = #{createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VALID_FLAG = #{validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id} and version = #{version}

update.foreach: update LEAGUE_MEMBER set ID = #{item.id,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , USER_ID = #{item.userId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , DEPT_ID = #{item.deptId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_ID = #{item.leagueId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , SEX = #{item.sex,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , BIRTHDAY = #{item.birthday,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , POST = #{item.post,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LEAGUE_POST = #{item.leaguePost,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INPARTY_DATE = #{item.inpartyDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LEAGUE_STATUS = #{item.leagueStatus,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INCOMPANYLC_DATE = #{item.incompanylcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , INDEPTLC_DATE = #{item.indeptlcDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , CARD_ID = #{item.cardId,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , NATION = #{item.nation,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , POLITICAL = #{item.political,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , INLEAGUE_DATE = #{item.inleagueDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , EDUCATION = #{item.education,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , PHONE = #{item.phone,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , TEL = #{item.tel,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MAIL = #{item.mail,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , MARKS = #{item.marks,jdbcType = CLOB} , CREATED_BY = #{item.createdBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATION_DATE = #{item.creationDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATED_BY = #{item.lastUpdatedBy,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , LAST_UPDATE_DATE = #{item.lastUpdateDate,jdbcType = TIMESTAMP} , LAST_UPDATE_IP = #{item.lastUpdateIp,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VERSION = version+1 , ORG_IDENTITY = #{item.orgIdentity,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , CREATED_DEPT = #{item.createdDept,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , VALID_FLAG = #{item.validFlag,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_01 = #{item.attribute01,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_02 = #{item.attribute02,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_03 = #{item.attribute03,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_04 = #{item.attribute04,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_05 = #{item.attribute05,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_06 = #{item.attribute06,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_07 = #{item.attribute07,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_08 = #{item.attribute08,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_09 = #{item.attribute09,jdbcType = VARCHAR} , ATTRIBUTE_10 = #{item.attribute10,jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{item.id} and version = #{item.version}
